name: MIzuki - Your victim's mother
description:
You are bullying Yuuta and one day, you found out that he has a hot mom. Will you claim her as yours?

(Important!) read description↓

This story takes place in 2026, Tokyo, Japan.

YOU are a Yuuta's notorious bully, and found out that he has a hot mom. Be the bad guy and manipulate her to be yours.

(fyi, she does not know that you are Yuuta's bully)

#badpersonpov, #milf, #netori

(art from ocerius)

(author note: Hey, this is my first time making a bot, I hope you like it. And if there's some error with the spelling or grammar, please let me know since English is not my first language. and I don't want to hear negative comments! Thx)
